source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the output section of the power amplifier circuit shown in figure, the following statement is incorrect ( )
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The OCL circuit can operate normally with a single power supply.

choice_map.A: The OCL circuit can operate normally with a single power supply.
choice_map.B: The function of the resistor and the diode in the series branch is to eliminate crossover distortion.
choice_map.C: The two matched power transistors \( VT1 \) and \( VT2 \) have current amplification functions.
choice_map.D: When amplifying a positive half-cycle signal, \( VT1 \) conducts, and \( VT2 \) conducts during the negative half-cycle.
